# 🌾 Kisan Price Buddy - Agricultural Price Intelligence System

Real-time commodity price intelligence system for Indian farmers using Government Open Data APIs.

## ✨ Features

- ✅ Real-time price comparison across all mandis
- ✅ AI-powered sell/hold recommendations
- ✅ Profit calculator with transport costs
- ✅ Telegram bot for instant alerts
- ✅ Historical price trends & predictions
- ✅ Multi-language support (Hindi, Punjabi, Tamil, Telugu)
- ✅ Voice input support
- ✅ PWA (Progressive Web App)

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

**Backend:** Python, Flask, Firebase
**Frontend:** HTML, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript
**Bot:** Python Telegram Bot
**Data:** Agmarknet API, data.gov.in
**ML:** Scikit-learn (Price Predictions)

## 📦 Installation

### 1. Clone Repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/yourusername/agri-price-intelligence.git
cd agri-price-intelligence
```
